feed.title: The future of the Bitcoin Core GUI

entry.title: The future of the Bitcoin Core GUI
entry.summary: The security of interacting with a Bitcoin wallet through various interfaces has been a subject of discussion. When not used over the internet or a wide area network (WAN), certain methods of interaction, such as using a specific command-line interface, can achieve a level of security comparable to that of direct interactions with the wallet. However, it is important to note that these methods may not reach the high standard of security offered by a fully integrated Bitcoin-qt environment. This distinction highlights the varying degrees of safety and risk associated with different modes of accessing and managing Bitcoin wallets, emphasizing the importance of understanding the specific security implications of each method.
